channel.title: Posts on allokkio
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on allokkio

item.title: Intro to Scrap Notes
item.description: scrap (/skɹæp/): A (small) piece; a fragment; a detached, incomplete portion. Discarded objects (especially metal) that may be dismantled to recover their constituent materials, junk. source I will try to put some pretty random notes on random thing on here. Since I see them as scrap, don’t expect to much from them.
